prompt: App icon, square 1:1, centered composition. A chunky lowercase letter 'a' rendered as crisp pixel-art geometry, 3D extruded with a thick beveled side, glowing lime green (#a3e635) face, matte black (#0a0a0a) extrusion side. Letterform shape: rectangular body with a notch cut from the top-right corner and a smaller rectangular hole in the middle (terminal-style monospace 'a'). Background: pure near-black with a subtle dot-matrix grid. Sharp edges, no anti-aliasing softness on the glyph. Studio product render, soft top-down rim light, no text. Icon design, brand mark, geometric, vector-clean.

App icon, square 1:1. A chunky lowercase 'a' floating as a glass tile — translucent lime-green (#a3e635) glass with refraction and inner subsurface scatter, sitting on a dark frosted-glass square. Letterform: blocky monospaced 'a' with top-right notch and rectangular inner counter. Soft bloom around the glyph, faint chromatic dispersion at the edges. Background: deep charcoal (#0a0a0a) with a single soft key light from upper-left. Apple-style glassmorphism, premium SaaS app icon.

App icon, square 1:1. A chunky lowercase 'a' glyph in vivid lime-green (#a3e635) phosphor, rendered as if displayed on a vintage CRT monitor — visible horizontal scanlines, subtle RGB chromatic aberration at the edges, faint phosphor bloom. Letterform: monospaced terminal 'a' with rectangular notch top-right and inner counter. Background: deep black with curved CRT vignette and a soft scanline gradient. 80s computer terminal aesthetic, hacker mark, glowing.

App icon, square 1:1. A chunky lowercase 'a' sculpted from polished iridescent chrome, primary hue lime-green (#a3e635) shifting to teal and magenta at the highlights, mirror-finish. Cinema-4D octane render, holographic, premium tech brand mark.

A chunky lowercase 'a' formed by a dense circuit-board trace pattern in lime-green (#a3e635) — copper traces, solder pads, and tiny SMD components arranged so the negative space reads as the letter 'a' (with the characteristic notched top-right and inner counter). Background: matte black PCB substrate (#0a0a0a). Top-down macro photo style, sharp focus, tech mark, brand icon, no text labels.
